raw_text: personal information name: álvarez, césar date of birth: 12/03/1988 e-mail address: cesar.alvarez.diezo gmail.com phone number (private): (+34) 91 6727672 phone number (mobile): (+34) 600885251 address: p dolores ibarruri n2 6a 28823 coslada (madrid) nationality: spanish education: 2006-2010: student of mechanical engineering degree (5 years) at universidad politécnica de madrid. 2010-2011: exchange student at chalmers university of technology (gothenburg, sweden) enrolled in the automotive engineering master programme (75 credits completed). master thesis completed at chalmers applied mechanics department, combustion division. thesis title: nitric oxide measurements in dimethyl ether flames using laser induced fluorescence. brief description of the thesis: the thesis work consisted of preparing a high pressure combustion chamber with optical access to achieve a combustion flame inside. after that, optical measurements were taken using a laser system and other optical devices such as ccd cameras, optical filters, etc. finally, the images from the cameras were postprocessed using matlab and several conclusions were drawn from the results. languages english: very good skills both written and spoken. spanish: mother language swedish: basic skills. french: basic skills. software advanced knowledge in matlab, catia v5, solid edge, microsoft office and borland pascal. intermediate knowledge in gt-suite (gt-ise and gt-post), festo fluidsim and cnc programming in fagor 8050. basic knowledge in fluent cfd, gambit and paraview.
